= test
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 6 directory (`third_party/gossamer/src/interface/ffi/test/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n=== Source Files\n\n* `startup_bench.zig` — startup_bench configuration or data\n* `dialog_test.zig` — Test file\n* `display_test.zig` — Test file\n* `webview_lifecycle_test.zig` — Test file\n* `gossamer_bench.zig` — gossamer_bench configuration or data\n* `integration_test.zig` — Test file\n\n=== Other Files\n\n* `0.4-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` — A2ML machine-readable metadata\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Source files* implement core functionality.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n
